scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/voicings build && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/core build && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/react build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/voicings test && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/core test && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/react test
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/voicings test:run && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/core test:run && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/react test:run
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/voicings lint && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/core lint && pnpm --filter @pepperhorn/react lint
